payload.message:
下面我只针对这份任务文件来讲，并且尽量把“字段长什么样”和“代码里谁在消费它”对应起来：[put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/configs/tasks/long_horizon/franka/put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml#L1)。

**整体结构**
- 根节点必须是 `tasks:`，因为解析器强制要求 YAML 顶层有这个键，并把其中每个元素当成一个独立任务配置读出来，所以一个文件理论上可以放多个任务。[task_config_parser.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/utils/task_config_parser.py#L31)
- 每个 `tasks` 元素会先被 workflow 读取，再做两件事：把 `robot_config_file` 合并进 `robots` 配置；把 `arena_file` 展开成真正的 `arena` 内容。[simbox_dual_workflow.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox_dual_workflow.py#L50) [simbox_dual_workflow.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox_dual_workflow.py#L57) [simbox_dual_workflow.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox_dual_workflow.py#L79)

**顶层基础字段**
- `name`：任务实例名，传给 `BaseTask(name=..., offset=...)`。它是这个 task 实例在 Isaac Sim 里的逻辑名字，不是 skill 名，也不是对象名。[put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/configs/tasks/long_horizon/franka/put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml#L3) [banana.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/tasks/banana.py#L42)
- `asset_root`：所有相对资源路径的根目录。对象 USD、机器人 USD、环境光 hdr、纹理、抓取标注都会基于它去拼路径。[put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/configs/tasks/long_horizon/franka/put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml#L4) [banana.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/tasks/banana.py#L45)
- `task`：真正要实例化的 Task 类名，这里是 `BananaBaseTask`。workflow 会用它去 `get_task_cls(...)` 并创建 task 对象。[put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/configs/tasks/long_horizon/franka/put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml#L5) [simbox_dual_workflow.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox_dual_workflow.py#L116)
- `task_id`：用于拼场景根路径，最终这个任务会挂在 `/World/task_0` 下面。[put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/configs/tasks/long_horizon/franka/put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml#L6) [banana.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/tasks/banana.py#L46)
- `offset`：传给 `BaseTask` 的全局偏移。这里是 `null`，等价于没有额外偏移。[put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/configs/tasks/long_horizon/franka/put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml#L8) [banana.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/tasks/banana.py#L42)
- `render`：控制 `get_observations()` 是否采集相机观测；`False` 时不会把相机数据放进 obs。[put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/configs/tasks/long_horizon/franka/put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml#L9) [banana.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/tasks/banana.py#L44) [banana.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/tasks/banana.py#L239)

**环境与碰撞**
- `arena_file`：外部 arena 配置文件路径。workflow 会把它读出来放到 `task_cfg["arena"]`，之后 `BananaBaseTask.set_up_scene()` 再逐个加载里面的 fixture。[put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/configs/tasks/long_horizon/franka/put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml#L13) [simbox_dual_workflow.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox_dual_workflow.py#L79) [banana.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/tasks/banana.py#L67)
- `neglect_collision_names`：名字里包含这些字符串的物体，会被加到“忽略碰撞”集合，不参与全局碰撞过滤。这里写了 `table`，所以桌子会被特殊处理。[put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/configs/tasks/long_horizon/franka/put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml#L15) [simbox_dual_workflow.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox_dual_workflow.py#L137)

**`env_map`**
- `envmap_lib`：HDR 环境光文件所在目录，相对 `asset_root`。[put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/configs/tasks/long_horizon/franka/put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml#L17) [banana.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/tasks/banana.py#L475)
- `apply_randomization`：是否每次随机选一张 hdr、随机强度、随机旋转。[put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/configs/tasks/long_horizon/franka/put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml#L19) [banana.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/tasks/banana.py#L479)
- `intensity_range`：DomeLight 强度采样范围。[put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/configs/tasks/long_horizon/franka/put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml#L20) [banana.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/tasks/banana.py#L481)
- `rotation_range`：XYZ 三个角都会在这个范围内独立随机采样，单位是角度。[put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/configs/tasks/long_horizon/franka/put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml#L21) [banana.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/tasks/banana.py#L482)

**`robots`**
- `name`：机器人实例名；后续 `skills:` 里必须用这个名字引用它。[put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/configs/tasks/long_horizon/franka/put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml#L25)
- `robot_config_file`：机器人基础配置模板。workflow 会先读这个文件，再用当前 YAML 里同名字段覆盖它，所以这里是“基类配置 + 局部重载”。[put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/configs/tasks/long_horizon/franka/put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml#L26) [simbox_dual_workflow.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox_dual_workflow.py#L57) [franka_robotiq85.yaml](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/configs/robots/franka_robotiq85.yaml#L1)
- `euler`：机器人初始欧拉角，单位度；最终通过 `get_orientation()` 转成四元数设置给机器人 prim。[put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/configs/tasks/long_horizon/franka/put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml#L27) [banana.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/tasks/banana.py#L254)
- `left_joint_home_std`：覆盖机器人默认 home pose 的关节扰动标准差。这一项不是 workflow 直接读，而是并入机器人 cfg 后由机器人类使用；这里等于给 Franka 的 home pose 加轻微随机扰动。[put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/configs/tasks/long_horizon/franka/put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml#L28) [franka_robotiq85.yaml](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/configs/robots/franka_robotiq85.yaml#L57)
- `ignore_substring`：传给 controller 的场景障碍物过滤关键词。名字里包含这些字符串的 prim 不会进入 CuRobo world obstacle。[put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/configs/tasks/long_horizon/franka/put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml#L29) [simbox_dual_workflow.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox_dual_workflow.py#L228)
- 从被合并进来的机器人模板看，这个机器人还隐含了很多没在任务 YAML 里显式写出的参数：`target_class`、`path`、`robot_file`、夹爪宽度、TCP offset、关节索引、ee/base 路径、抓手关键点、默认 home pose 等。[franka_robotiq85.yaml](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/configs/robots/franka_robotiq85.yaml#L5)

**`objects`**
- `name`：对象名；后续 `skills.objects`、`regions.object` 都通过它引用。[put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/configs/tasks/long_horizon/franka/put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml#L33)
- `target_class`：对象类类型，决定实例化哪种 object wrapper。这里 `trashcan` 是 `ArticulatedObject`，`trash_0` 是 `RigidObject`。[put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/configs/tasks/long_horizon/franka/put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml#L34) [put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/configs/tasks/long_horizon/franka/put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml#L49) [banana.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/tasks/banana.py#L300)
- `path`：USD 资源相对 `asset_root` 的路径。对刚体对象是直接加载；对带随机化的 articulated 对象，启动时会被重写成随机挑中的实例路径。[put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/configs/tasks/long_horizon/franka/put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml#L41) [put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/configs/tasks/long_horizon/franka/put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml#L48) [simbox_dual_workflow.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox_dual_workflow.py#L88)
- `dataset`：数据集标签，运行主链里基本不直接消费，更多是资产组织/元数据。
- `category`：类别名。对刚体对象主要是语义标签；对随机化对象会在随机采样后被更新，并参与语言指令替换。[put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/configs/tasks/long_horizon/franka/put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml#L42) [language.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/utils/language.py#L32)
- `info_name`：ArticulatedObject 关键点信息目录名，代码会去找 `Kps/<info_name>/info.json`。[put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/configs/tasks/long_horizon/franka/put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml#L36) [articulated_object.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/objects/articulated_object.py#L24)
- `obj_info_path`：关节物体关键点 info.json 的相对路径。随机化 articulated object 时会自动填充；`artpreplan/close/open` 这类 skill 可再次用它更新物体关键点定义。[put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/configs/tasks/long_horizon/franka/put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml#L43) [simbox_dual_workflow.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox_dual_workflow.py#L103) [artpreplan.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/skills/artpreplan.py#L36)
- `art_cat`：随机化 articulated object 时用于枚举候选实例的目录。[put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/configs/tasks/long_horizon/franka/put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml#L44) [simbox_dual_workflow.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox_dual_workflow.py#L92)
- `joint_position_range`：ArticulatedObject 初始化时，把其关节位置随机设到这个区间内。[put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/configs/tasks/long_horizon/franka/put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml#L39) [articulated_object.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/objects/articulated_object.py#L145)
- `prim_path_child`：RigidObject 里真正作为刚体 prim 的子路径，比如 `Aligned`；对象加载时会拼成 `base_prim_path/prim_path_child`。[put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/configs/tasks/long_horizon/franka/put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml#L52) [rigid_object.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/objects/rigid_object.py#L48)
- `translation/euler/scale`：初始局部位姿和缩放。`euler` 单位是度。项目里四元数大概率统一是 `[w, x, y, z]`，这是从多处 `as_quat(scalar_first=True)` 推断出来的。[banana.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/tasks/banana.py#L324) [close.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/skills/close.py#L96)
- `apply_randomization`：是否在 reset/randomize 时替换资产或重新随机姿态。
- `orientation_mode`：刚体随机化时的朝向策略，`random` 表示欧拉角在 `[-180,180]` 均匀采样；还有 `suggested` 和 `keep` 两种模式。[put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/configs/tasks/long_horizon/franka/put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml#L57) [dr.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/utils/dr.py#L228)

**`regions`**
- 这是“初始摆放规则”，不是 motion planning。`BananaBaseTask._set_regions()` 会按这些规则把对象/机器人放到目标区域。[put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/configs/tasks/long_horizon/franka/put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml#L60) [banana.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/tasks/banana.py#L421)
- `object`：要摆放的对象名；`target`：参考对象名，比如这里都是 `table`。[put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/configs/tasks/long_horizon/franka/put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml#L62)
- `random_type`：选择哪个采样器函数。这里用 `A_on_B_region_sampler`，表示“把 A 放在 B 上面”。[put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/configs/tasks/long_horizon/franka/put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml#L64) [region_sampler.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/utils/region_sampler.py#L25)
- `random_config.pos_range`：相对目标 bbox 中心的平移采样范围，写成 `[min_xyz, max_xyz]`。`A_on_B_region_sampler` 会把对象先放到目标顶面，再加这个偏移。[put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/configs/tasks/long_horizon/franka/put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml#L65) [region_sampler.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/utils/region_sampler.py#L27)
- `random_config.yaw_rotation`：绕 z 轴的随机角度范围，单位度。[put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/configs/tasks/long_horizon/franka/put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml#L70) [region_sampler.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/utils/region_sampler.py#L41)

**`cameras`**
- `name`：相机名，进入观测时也用这个键。[put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/configs/tasks/long_horizon/franka/put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml#L94)
- `translation/orientation`：相机相对 `parent` 的局部位姿；`camera_axes` 指坐标轴约定，这里是 `usd`。[put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/configs/tasks/long_horizon/franka/put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml#L95) [banana.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/tasks/banana.py#L288)
- `camera_file`：外部相机内参/分辨率配置，加载后会放进 `cfg["params"]` 传给 `CustomCamera`。[put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/configs/tasks/long_horizon/franka/put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml#L98) [banana.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/tasks/banana.py#L272)
- `parent`：挂载参考 prim。非空时拼成 `task_root/parent`；空字符串表示世界下独立相机。[put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/configs/tasks/long_horizon/franka/put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml#L99) [banana.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/tasks/banana.py#L265)
- `apply_randomization/max_translation_noise/max_orientation_noise`：是否对相机外参加扰动，平移噪声单位米，姿态噪声单位度。[put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/configs/tasks/long_horizon/franka/put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml#L100) [banana.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/tasks/banana.py#L463)

**`data`**
- `task_dir`：日志/数据保存目录名。[put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/configs/tasks/long_horizon/franka/put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml#L115) [simbox_dual_workflow.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox_dual_workflow.py#L164)
- `language_instruction` / `detailed_language_instruction`：任务文本描述。对象若开启随机化，会把模板里的对象名替换成随机后的 `category`。[put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/configs/tasks/long_horizon/franka/put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml#L116) [language.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/utils/language.py#L17)
- `collect_info`：数据集标记；对随机 articulated object，这个字段还可能在 reset 时被自动改成实际采样到的 category。[put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/configs/tasks/long_horizon/franka/put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml#L118) [simbox_dual_workflow.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox_dual_workflow.py#L105)
- `version`：日志元数据版本号。[put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/configs/tasks/long_horizon/franka/put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml#L119) [simbox_dual_workflow.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox_dual_workflow.py#L169)
- `max_episode_length`：最大仿真 step 数；主循环以它作为硬停止条件。[put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/configs/tasks/long_horizon/franka/put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml#L121) [simbox_dual_workflow.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox_dual_workflow.py#L454)
- `update`：我没有在主执行链里看到它被直接消费，更像历史兼容字段或外部流程元数据。

**`skills` 的结构**
- `skills` 是“高层流程编排”，不是底层规划结果。workflow 会按这里的结构实例化 skill。[put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/configs/tasks/long_horizon/franka/put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml#L123) [simbox_dual_workflow.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox_dual_workflow.py#L185)
- 最外层 list 表示 phase；phase 内按机器人名分组；机器人下面再按 `left/right` 分组；每个 arm 下是顺序 skill 列表。这个任务只有一个机器人、只用 `left` 臂。[put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/configs/tasks/long_horizon/franka/put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml#L125) [simbox_dual_workflow.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox_dual_workflow.py#L196)

**这份 YAML 里的 4 个 skill**
- `artpreplan`：给关节物体操作前做 KPAM 关键位姿预规划。`objects` 只取第一个元素；`planner_setting` 整个 dict 直接传给 `KPAMPlanner`；`contact_pose_index`、`success_threshold`、`update_art_joint` 也会从这里读。[put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/configs/tasks/long_horizon/franka/put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml#L129) [artpreplan.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/skills/artpreplan.py#L27) [planner.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/solver/planner.py#L94) 这类 skill 里 `collision_valid: False` 在 `Artpreplan` 本身没有被用到，至少这份代码里是这样。
- `pick`：从抓取标注里采样末端抓取位姿，再做 IK/forward 可达性筛选，最后生成 pregrasp/grasp/夹爪闭合/attach/postgrasp 命令。[pick.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/skills/pick.py#L68) 这份 YAML 里出现的参数分别是：`objects` 抓哪个物体；`filter_x_dir/filter_z_dir` 过滤候选朝向；`pre_grasp_offset` 预抓取退让距离；`gripper_change_steps` 夹爪动作保持帧数；`t_eps/o_eps` 子任务完成判定阈值；`process_valid` 成功时是否检查速度稳定；`lift_th` 是否要求物体被抬起一定高度；`post_grasp_offset_min/max` 抓取后抬升范围；`test_mode: ik` 表示候选筛选用 IK，而不是完整 forward 规划。[pick.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/skills/pick.py#L115) [pick.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/skills/pick.py#L196) [pick.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/skills/pick.py#L323)
- `place`：为被抓物体在目标容器/目标对象上采样放置点和姿态，再筛可达解，最后生成 preplace/place/开夹爪/detach/postplace 命令。[place.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/skills/place.py#L64) 这里的 `objects` 是 `[被放的物体, 放到哪里]`；`filter_x_dir/filter_z_dir` 用于筛姿态；`pre_place_z_offset/place_z_offset` 控制预放置和放置高度；`position_constraint: object` 表示优先约束物体相对目标的位置，而不是单纯约束夹爪位姿；`t_eps/o_eps` 是执行完成阈值；`success_mode: xybbox` 表示成功判定看物体 xy 是否落在目标 bbox 内。[place.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/skills/place.py#L141) [place.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/skills/place.py#L163) [place.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/skills/place.py#L384)
- `close`：真正执行关节物体关闭动作。它会调用同样的 `KPAMPlanner.get_keypose()`，然后把关键位姿逐个转成 `close_gripper` 命令序列。[close.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/skills/close.py#L62) `collision_valid` 在这里是生效的，决定成功判定时是否检查禁碰撞和夹爪基座碰撞；`planner_setting.success_threshold` 决定关节位移达到什么程度算成功；`planner_setting.success_mode` 默认是 `zero`，表示关节接近 0 算关闭完成。[close.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/skills/close.py#L179)

**`planner_setting` 里每项是什么意思**
- `task_name` / `category_name`：KPAM 优化问题的语义标签，用来描述当前任务类型和对象类别。[put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/configs/tasks/long_horizon/franka/put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml#L134)
- `tool_keypoint_name_list`：机械手工具关键点名列表，必须能在机器人配置的 gripper keypoints 里找到，如 `tool_head/tool_tail/tool_side`。[put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/configs/tasks/long_horizon/franka/put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml#L137) [franka_robotiq85.yaml](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/configs/robots/franka_robotiq85.yaml#L31)
- `object_keypoint_name_list`：目标物体上的关键点名，必须存在于 articulated object 的 info.json 里。[put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/configs/tasks/long_horizon/franka/put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml#L138) [articulated_object.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/objects/articulated_object.py#L49)
- `constraint_list`：KPAM 求解的几何约束列表。`point2point_constraint` 约束两个关键点重合；`frame_axis_parallel` 约束某条工具轴和目标轴平行并满足点积方向；`target_axis_frame: object` 表示目标轴定义在物体坐标系中；`tolerance` 是误差容忍；`target_inner_product` 用于区分同向/反向/正交趋势。[put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/configs/tasks/long_horizon/franka/put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml#L140) [planner.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/solver/planner.py#L595)
- `contact_pose_index`：在关键位姿序列中的“接触位姿”索引。`close` skill 会在到达这个 pose 后更新碰撞忽略列表。[put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/configs/tasks/long_horizon/franka/put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml#L169) [close.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/skills/close.py#L100)
- `pre_actuation_motions` / `post_actuation_motions`：围绕任务目标位姿再生成一串前置/后置关键位姿的小动作，元素格式是 `["translate_x|translate_y|translate_z|rotate", float]`。[put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/configs/tasks/long_horizon/franka/put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml#L171) [planner.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/solver/planner.py#L107) [planner.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/solver/planner.py#L209)
- `keypose_random_range`：对 KPAM 求出的目标关键位姿再加一点位置/姿态随机扰动，增加数据多样性。这里 orientation 是各轴角度范围，position 是 xyz 平移范围。[put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/configs/tasks/long_horizon/franka/put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml#L183) [planner.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/solver/planner.py#L722)
- `success_threshold`：`close/artpreplan` 读取它作为任务成功阈值。对 `close` 来说，最终会用它和关节位置变化一起判断是否“关上了”。[put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/configs/tasks/long_horizon/franka/put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml#L139) [close.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/skills/close.py#L30)

一句话总结：这类 task YAML 不是单纯“填资源路径”，它同时定义了 3 层东西：场景实例化参数、数据采样/随机化参数、以及高层 skill 编排参数。真正的低层轨迹规划只发生在 skill 生成出目标 pose 之后，由 controller/CuRobo 去做。

如果你要，我下一条可以直接把这份 YAML 逐行做“字段旁注版”，按原文件顺序一行一行解释。

content.text:
下面我只针对这份任务文件来讲，并且尽量把“字段长什么样”和“代码里谁在消费它”对应起来：[put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/configs/tasks/long_horizon/franka/put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml#L1)。

**整体结构**
- 根节点必须是 `tasks:`，因为解析器强制要求 YAML 顶层有这个键，并把其中每个元素当成一个独立任务配置读出来，所以一个文件理论上可以放多个任务。[task_config_parser.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/utils/task_config_parser.py#L31)
- 每个 `tasks` 元素会先被 workflow 读取，再做两件事：把 `robot_config_file` 合并进 `robots` 配置；把 `arena_file` 展开成真正的 `arena` 内容。[simbox_dual_workflow.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox_dual_workflow.py#L50) [simbox_dual_workflow.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox_dual_workflow.py#L57) [simbox_dual_workflow.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox_dual_workflow.py#L79)

**顶层基础字段**
- `name`：任务实例名，传给 `BaseTask(name=..., offset=...)`。它是这个 task 实例在 Isaac Sim 里的逻辑名字，不是 skill 名，也不是对象名。[put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/configs/tasks/long_horizon/franka/put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml#L3) [banana.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/tasks/banana.py#L42)
- `asset_root`：所有相对资源路径的根目录。对象 USD、机器人 USD、环境光 hdr、纹理、抓取标注都会基于它去拼路径。[put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/configs/tasks/long_horizon/franka/put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml#L4) [banana.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/tasks/banana.py#L45)
- `task`：真正要实例化的 Task 类名，这里是 `BananaBaseTask`。workflow 会用它去 `get_task_cls(...)` 并创建 task 对象。[put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/configs/tasks/long_horizon/franka/put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml#L5) [simbox_dual_workflow.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox_dual_workflow.py#L116)
- `task_id`：用于拼场景根路径，最终这个任务会挂在 `/World/task_0` 下面。[put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/configs/tasks/long_horizon/franka/put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml#L6) [banana.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/tasks/banana.py#L46)
- `offset`：传给 `BaseTask` 的全局偏移。这里是 `null`，等价于没有额外偏移。[put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/configs/tasks/long_horizon/franka/put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml#L8) [banana.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/tasks/banana.py#L42)
- `render`：控制 `get_observations()` 是否采集相机观测；`False` 时不会把相机数据放进 obs。[put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/configs/tasks/long_horizon/franka/put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml#L9) [banana.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/tasks/banana.py#L44) [banana.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/tasks/banana.py#L239)

**环境与碰撞**
- `arena_file`：外部 arena 配置文件路径。workflow 会把它读出来放到 `task_cfg["arena"]`，之后 `BananaBaseTask.set_up_scene()` 再逐个加载里面的 fixture。[put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/configs/tasks/long_horizon/franka/put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml#L13) [simbox_dual_workflow.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox_dual_workflow.py#L79) [banana.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/tasks/banana.py#L67)
- `neglect_collision_names`：名字里包含这些字符串的物体，会被加到“忽略碰撞”集合，不参与全局碰撞过滤。这里写了 `table`，所以桌子会被特殊处理。[put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/configs/tasks/long_horizon/franka/put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml#L15) [simbox_dual_workflow.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox_dual_workflow.py#L137)

**`env_map`**
- `envmap_lib`：HDR 环境光文件所在目录，相对 `asset_root`。[put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/configs/tasks/long_horizon/franka/put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml#L17) [banana.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/tasks/banana.py#L475)
- `apply_randomization`：是否每次随机选一张 hdr、随机强度、随机旋转。[put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/configs/tasks/long_horizon/franka/put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml#L19) [banana.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/tasks/banana.py#L479)
- `intensity_range`：DomeLight 强度采样范围。[put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/configs/tasks/long_horizon/franka/put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml#L20) [banana.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/tasks/banana.py#L481)
- `rotation_range`：XYZ 三个角都会在这个范围内独立随机采样，单位是角度。[put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/configs/tasks/long_horizon/franka/put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml#L21) [banana.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/tasks/banana.py#L482)

**`robots`**
- `name`：机器人实例名；后续 `skills:` 里必须用这个名字引用它。[put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/configs/tasks/long_horizon/franka/put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml#L25)
- `robot_config_file`：机器人基础配置模板。workflow 会先读这个文件，再用当前 YAML 里同名字段覆盖它，所以这里是“基类配置 + 局部重载”。[put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/configs/tasks/long_horizon/franka/put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml#L26) [simbox_dual_workflow.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox_dual_workflow.py#L57) [franka_robotiq85.yaml](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/configs/robots/franka_robotiq85.yaml#L1)
- `euler`：机器人初始欧拉角，单位度；最终通过 `get_orientation()` 转成四元数设置给机器人 prim。[put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/configs/tasks/long_horizon/franka/put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml#L27) [banana.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/tasks/banana.py#L254)
- `left_joint_home_std`：覆盖机器人默认 home pose 的关节扰动标准差。这一项不是 workflow 直接读，而是并入机器人 cfg 后由机器人类使用；这里等于给 Franka 的 home pose 加轻微随机扰动。[put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/configs/tasks/long_horizon/franka/put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml#L28) [franka_robotiq85.yaml](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/configs/robots/franka_robotiq85.yaml#L57)
- `ignore_substring`：传给 controller 的场景障碍物过滤关键词。名字里包含这些字符串的 prim 不会进入 CuRobo world obstacle。[put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/configs/tasks/long_horizon/franka/put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml#L29) [simbox_dual_workflow.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox_dual_workflow.py#L228)
- 从被合并进来的机器人模板看，这个机器人还隐含了很多没在任务 YAML 里显式写出的参数：`target_class`、`path`、`robot_file`、夹爪宽度、TCP offset、关节索引、ee/base 路径、抓手关键点、默认 home pose 等。[franka_robotiq85.yaml](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/configs/robots/franka_robotiq85.yaml#L5)

**`objects`**
- `name`：对象名；后续 `skills.objects`、`regions.object` 都通过它引用。[put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/configs/tasks/long_horizon/franka/put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml#L33)
- `target_class`：对象类类型，决定实例化哪种 object wrapper。这里 `trashcan` 是 `ArticulatedObject`，`trash_0` 是 `RigidObject`。[put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/configs/tasks/long_horizon/franka/put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml#L34) [put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/configs/tasks/long_horizon/franka/put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml#L49) [banana.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/tasks/banana.py#L300)
- `path`：USD 资源相对 `asset_root` 的路径。对刚体对象是直接加载；对带随机化的 articulated 对象，启动时会被重写成随机挑中的实例路径。[put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/configs/tasks/long_horizon/franka/put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml#L41) [put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/configs/tasks/long_horizon/franka/put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml#L48) [simbox_dual_workflow.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox_dual_workflow.py#L88)
- `dataset`：数据集标签，运行主链里基本不直接消费，更多是资产组织/元数据。
- `category`：类别名。对刚体对象主要是语义标签；对随机化对象会在随机采样后被更新，并参与语言指令替换。[put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/configs/tasks/long_horizon/franka/put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml#L42) [language.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/utils/language.py#L32)
- `info_name`：ArticulatedObject 关键点信息目录名，代码会去找 `Kps/<info_name>/info.json`。[put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/configs/tasks/long_horizon/franka/put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml#L36) [articulated_object.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/objects/articulated_object.py#L24)
- `obj_info_path`：关节物体关键点 info.json 的相对路径。随机化 articulated object 时会自动填充；`artpreplan/close/open` 这类 skill 可再次用它更新物体关键点定义。[put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/configs/tasks/long_horizon/franka/put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml#L43) [simbox_dual_workflow.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox_dual_workflow.py#L103) [artpreplan.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/skills/artpreplan.py#L36)
- `art_cat`：随机化 articulated object 时用于枚举候选实例的目录。[put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/configs/tasks/long_horizon/franka/put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml#L44) [simbox_dual_workflow.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox_dual_workflow.py#L92)
- `joint_position_range`：ArticulatedObject 初始化时，把其关节位置随机设到这个区间内。[put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/configs/tasks/long_horizon/franka/put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml#L39) [articulated_object.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/objects/articulated_object.py#L145)
- `prim_path_child`：RigidObject 里真正作为刚体 prim 的子路径，比如 `Aligned`；对象加载时会拼成 `base_prim_path/prim_path_child`。[put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/configs/tasks/long_horizon/franka/put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml#L52) [rigid_object.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/objects/rigid_object.py#L48)
- `translation/euler/scale`：初始局部位姿和缩放。`euler` 单位是度。项目里四元数大概率统一是 `[w, x, y, z]`，这是从多处 `as_quat(scalar_first=True)` 推断出来的。[banana.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/tasks/banana.py#L324) [close.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/skills/close.py#L96)
- `apply_randomization`：是否在 reset/randomize 时替换资产或重新随机姿态。
- `orientation_mode`：刚体随机化时的朝向策略，`random` 表示欧拉角在 `[-180,180]` 均匀采样；还有 `suggested` 和 `keep` 两种模式。[put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/configs/tasks/long_horizon/franka/put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml#L57) [dr.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/utils/dr.py#L228)

**`regions`**
- 这是“初始摆放规则”，不是 motion planning。`BananaBaseTask._set_regions()` 会按这些规则把对象/机器人放到目标区域。[put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/configs/tasks/long_horizon/franka/put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml#L60) [banana.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/tasks/banana.py#L421)
- `object`：要摆放的对象名；`target`：参考对象名，比如这里都是 `table`。[put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/configs/tasks/long_horizon/franka/put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml#L62)
- `random_type`：选择哪个采样器函数。这里用 `A_on_B_region_sampler`，表示“把 A 放在 B 上面”。[put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/configs/tasks/long_horizon/franka/put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml#L64) [region_sampler.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/utils/region_sampler.py#L25)
- `random_config.pos_range`：相对目标 bbox 中心的平移采样范围，写成 `[min_xyz, max_xyz]`。`A_on_B_region_sampler` 会把对象先放到目标顶面，再加这个偏移。[put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/configs/tasks/long_horizon/franka/put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml#L65) [region_sampler.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/utils/region_sampler.py#L27)
- `random_config.yaw_rotation`：绕 z 轴的随机角度范围，单位度。[put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/configs/tasks/long_horizon/franka/put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml#L70) [region_sampler.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/utils/region_sampler.py#L41)

**`cameras`**
- `name`：相机名，进入观测时也用这个键。[put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/configs/tasks/long_horizon/franka/put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml#L94)
- `translation/orientation`：相机相对 `parent` 的局部位姿；`camera_axes` 指坐标轴约定，这里是 `usd`。[put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/configs/tasks/long_horizon/franka/put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml#L95) [banana.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/tasks/banana.py#L288)
- `camera_file`：外部相机内参/分辨率配置，加载后会放进 `cfg["params"]` 传给 `CustomCamera`。[put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/configs/tasks/long_horizon/franka/put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml#L98) [banana.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/tasks/banana.py#L272)
- `parent`：挂载参考 prim。非空时拼成 `task_root/parent`；空字符串表示世界下独立相机。[put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/configs/tasks/long_horizon/franka/put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml#L99) [banana.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/tasks/banana.py#L265)
- `apply_randomization/max_translation_noise/max_orientation_noise`：是否对相机外参加扰动，平移噪声单位米，姿态噪声单位度。[put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/configs/tasks/long_horizon/franka/put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml#L100) [banana.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/tasks/banana.py#L463)

**`data`**
- `task_dir`：日志/数据保存目录名。[put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/configs/tasks/long_horizon/franka/put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml#L115) [simbox_dual_workflow.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox_dual_workflow.py#L164)
- `language_instruction` / `detailed_language_instruction`：任务文本描述。对象若开启随机化，会把模板里的对象名替换成随机后的 `category`。[put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/configs/tasks/long_horizon/franka/put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml#L116) [language.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/utils/language.py#L17)
- `collect_info`：数据集标记；对随机 articulated object，这个字段还可能在 reset 时被自动改成实际采样到的 category。[put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/configs/tasks/long_horizon/franka/put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml#L118) [simbox_dual_workflow.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox_dual_workflow.py#L105)
- `version`：日志元数据版本号。[put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/configs/tasks/long_horizon/franka/put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml#L119) [simbox_dual_workflow.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox_dual_workflow.py#L169)
- `max_episode_length`：最大仿真 step 数；主循环以它作为硬停止条件。[put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/configs/tasks/long_horizon/franka/put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml#L121) [simbox_dual_workflow.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox_dual_workflow.py#L454)
- `update`：我没有在主执行链里看到它被直接消费，更像历史兼容字段或外部流程元数据。

**`skills` 的结构**
- `skills` 是“高层流程编排”，不是底层规划结果。workflow 会按这里的结构实例化 skill。[put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/configs/tasks/long_horizon/franka/put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml#L123) [simbox_dual_workflow.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox_dual_workflow.py#L185)
- 最外层 list 表示 phase；phase 内按机器人名分组；机器人下面再按 `left/right` 分组；每个 arm 下是顺序 skill 列表。这个任务只有一个机器人、只用 `left` 臂。[put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/configs/tasks/long_horizon/franka/put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml#L125) [simbox_dual_workflow.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox_dual_workflow.py#L196)

**这份 YAML 里的 4 个 skill**
- `artpreplan`：给关节物体操作前做 KPAM 关键位姿预规划。`objects` 只取第一个元素；`planner_setting` 整个 dict 直接传给 `KPAMPlanner`；`contact_pose_index`、`success_threshold`、`update_art_joint` 也会从这里读。[put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/configs/tasks/long_horizon/franka/put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml#L129) [artpreplan.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/skills/artpreplan.py#L27) [planner.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/solver/planner.py#L94) 这类 skill 里 `collision_valid: False` 在 `Artpreplan` 本身没有被用到，至少这份代码里是这样。
- `pick`：从抓取标注里采样末端抓取位姿，再做 IK/forward 可达性筛选，最后生成 pregrasp/grasp/夹爪闭合/attach/postgrasp 命令。[pick.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/skills/pick.py#L68) 这份 YAML 里出现的参数分别是：`objects` 抓哪个物体；`filter_x_dir/filter_z_dir` 过滤候选朝向；`pre_grasp_offset` 预抓取退让距离；`gripper_change_steps` 夹爪动作保持帧数；`t_eps/o_eps` 子任务完成判定阈值；`process_valid` 成功时是否检查速度稳定；`lift_th` 是否要求物体被抬起一定高度；`post_grasp_offset_min/max` 抓取后抬升范围；`test_mode: ik` 表示候选筛选用 IK，而不是完整 forward 规划。[pick.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/skills/pick.py#L115) [pick.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/skills/pick.py#L196) [pick.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/skills/pick.py#L323)
- `place`：为被抓物体在目标容器/目标对象上采样放置点和姿态，再筛可达解，最后生成 preplace/place/开夹爪/detach/postplace 命令。[place.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/skills/place.py#L64) 这里的 `objects` 是 `[被放的物体, 放到哪里]`；`filter_x_dir/filter_z_dir` 用于筛姿态；`pre_place_z_offset/place_z_offset` 控制预放置和放置高度；`position_constraint: object` 表示优先约束物体相对目标的位置，而不是单纯约束夹爪位姿；`t_eps/o_eps` 是执行完成阈值；`success_mode: xybbox` 表示成功判定看物体 xy 是否落在目标 bbox 内。[place.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/skills/place.py#L141) [place.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/skills/place.py#L163) [place.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/skills/place.py#L384)
- `close`：真正执行关节物体关闭动作。它会调用同样的 `KPAMPlanner.get_keypose()`，然后把关键位姿逐个转成 `close_gripper` 命令序列。[close.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/skills/close.py#L62) `collision_valid` 在这里是生效的，决定成功判定时是否检查禁碰撞和夹爪基座碰撞；`planner_setting.success_threshold` 决定关节位移达到什么程度算成功；`planner_setting.success_mode` 默认是 `zero`，表示关节接近 0 算关闭完成。[close.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/skills/close.py#L179)

**`planner_setting` 里每项是什么意思**
- `task_name` / `category_name`：KPAM 优化问题的语义标签，用来描述当前任务类型和对象类别。[put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/configs/tasks/long_horizon/franka/put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml#L134)
- `tool_keypoint_name_list`：机械手工具关键点名列表，必须能在机器人配置的 gripper keypoints 里找到，如 `tool_head/tool_tail/tool_side`。[put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/configs/tasks/long_horizon/franka/put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml#L137) [franka_robotiq85.yaml](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/configs/robots/franka_robotiq85.yaml#L31)
- `object_keypoint_name_list`：目标物体上的关键点名，必须存在于 articulated object 的 info.json 里。[put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/configs/tasks/long_horizon/franka/put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml#L138) [articulated_object.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/objects/articulated_object.py#L49)
- `constraint_list`：KPAM 求解的几何约束列表。`point2point_constraint` 约束两个关键点重合；`frame_axis_parallel` 约束某条工具轴和目标轴平行并满足点积方向；`target_axis_frame: object` 表示目标轴定义在物体坐标系中；`tolerance` 是误差容忍；`target_inner_product` 用于区分同向/反向/正交趋势。[put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/configs/tasks/long_horizon/franka/put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml#L140) [planner.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/solver/planner.py#L595)
- `contact_pose_index`：在关键位姿序列中的“接触位姿”索引。`close` skill 会在到达这个 pose 后更新碰撞忽略列表。[put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/configs/tasks/long_horizon/franka/put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml#L169) [close.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/skills/close.py#L100)
- `pre_actuation_motions` / `post_actuation_motions`：围绕任务目标位姿再生成一串前置/后置关键位姿的小动作，元素格式是 `["translate_x|translate_y|translate_z|rotate", float]`。[put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/configs/tasks/long_horizon/franka/put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml#L171) [planner.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/solver/planner.py#L107) [planner.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/solver/planner.py#L209)
- `keypose_random_range`：对 KPAM 求出的目标关键位姿再加一点位置/姿态随机扰动，增加数据多样性。这里 orientation 是各轴角度范围，position 是 xyz 平移范围。[put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/configs/tasks/long_horizon/franka/put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml#L183) [planner.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/solver/planner.py#L722)
- `success_threshold`：`close/artpreplan` 读取它作为任务成功阈值。对 `close` 来说，最终会用它和关节位置变化一起判断是否“关上了”。[put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/configs/tasks/long_horizon/franka/put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml#L139) [close.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/skills/close.py#L30)

一句话总结：这类 task YAML 不是单纯“填资源路径”，它同时定义了 3 层东西：场景实例化参数、数据采样/随机化参数、以及高层 skill 编排参数。真正的低层轨迹规划只发生在 skill 生成出目标 pose 之后，由 controller/CuRobo 去做。

如果你要，我下一条可以直接把这份 YAML 逐行做“字段旁注版”，按原文件顺序一行一行解释。

payload.last_agent_message:
下面我只针对这份任务文件来讲，并且尽量把“字段长什么样”和“代码里谁在消费它”对应起来：[put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/configs/tasks/long_horizon/franka/put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml#L1)。

**整体结构**
- 根节点必须是 `tasks:`，因为解析器强制要求 YAML 顶层有这个键，并把其中每个元素当成一个独立任务配置读出来，所以一个文件理论上可以放多个任务。[task_config_parser.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/utils/task_config_parser.py#L31)
- 每个 `tasks` 元素会先被 workflow 读取，再做两件事：把 `robot_config_file` 合并进 `robots` 配置；把 `arena_file` 展开成真正的 `arena` 内容。[simbox_dual_workflow.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox_dual_workflow.py#L50) [simbox_dual_workflow.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox_dual_workflow.py#L57) [simbox_dual_workflow.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox_dual_workflow.py#L79)

**顶层基础字段**
- `name`：任务实例名，传给 `BaseTask(name=..., offset=...)`。它是这个 task 实例在 Isaac Sim 里的逻辑名字，不是 skill 名，也不是对象名。[put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/configs/tasks/long_horizon/franka/put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml#L3) [banana.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/tasks/banana.py#L42)
- `asset_root`：所有相对资源路径的根目录。对象 USD、机器人 USD、环境光 hdr、纹理、抓取标注都会基于它去拼路径。[put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/configs/tasks/long_horizon/franka/put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml#L4) [banana.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/tasks/banana.py#L45)
- `task`：真正要实例化的 Task 类名，这里是 `BananaBaseTask`。workflow 会用它去 `get_task_cls(...)` 并创建 task 对象。[put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/configs/tasks/long_horizon/franka/put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml#L5) [simbox_dual_workflow.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox_dual_workflow.py#L116)
- `task_id`：用于拼场景根路径，最终这个任务会挂在 `/World/task_0` 下面。[put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/configs/tasks/long_horizon/franka/put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml#L6) [banana.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/tasks/banana.py#L46)
- `offset`：传给 `BaseTask` 的全局偏移。这里是 `null`，等价于没有额外偏移。[put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/configs/tasks/long_horizon/franka/put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml#L8) [banana.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/tasks/banana.py#L42)
- `render`：控制 `get_observations()` 是否采集相机观测；`False` 时不会把相机数据放进 obs。[put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/configs/tasks/long_horizon/franka/put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml#L9) [banana.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/tasks/banana.py#L44) [banana.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/tasks/banana.py#L239)

**环境与碰撞**
- `arena_file`：外部 arena 配置文件路径。workflow 会把它读出来放到 `task_cfg["arena"]`，之后 `BananaBaseTask.set_up_scene()` 再逐个加载里面的 fixture。[put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/configs/tasks/long_horizon/franka/put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml#L13) [simbox_dual_workflow.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox_dual_workflow.py#L79) [banana.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/tasks/banana.py#L67)
- `neglect_collision_names`：名字里包含这些字符串的物体，会被加到“忽略碰撞”集合，不参与全局碰撞过滤。这里写了 `table`，所以桌子会被特殊处理。[put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/configs/tasks/long_horizon/franka/put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml#L15) [simbox_dual_workflow.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox_dual_workflow.py#L137)

**`env_map`**
- `envmap_lib`：HDR 环境光文件所在目录，相对 `asset_root`。[put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/configs/tasks/long_horizon/franka/put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml#L17) [banana.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/tasks/banana.py#L475)
- `apply_randomization`：是否每次随机选一张 hdr、随机强度、随机旋转。[put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/configs/tasks/long_horizon/franka/put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml#L19) [banana.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/tasks/banana.py#L479)
- `intensity_range`：DomeLight 强度采样范围。[put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/configs/tasks/long_horizon/franka/put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml#L20) [banana.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/tasks/banana.py#L481)
- `rotation_range`：XYZ 三个角都会在这个范围内独立随机采样，单位是角度。[put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/configs/tasks/long_horizon/franka/put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml#L21) [banana.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/tasks/banana.py#L482)

**`robots`**
- `name`：机器人实例名；后续 `skills:` 里必须用这个名字引用它。[put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/configs/tasks/long_horizon/franka/put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml#L25)
- `robot_config_file`：机器人基础配置模板。workflow 会先读这个文件，再用当前 YAML 里同名字段覆盖它，所以这里是“基类配置 + 局部重载”。[put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/configs/tasks/long_horizon/franka/put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml#L26) [simbox_dual_workflow.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox_dual_workflow.py#L57) [franka_robotiq85.yaml](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/configs/robots/franka_robotiq85.yaml#L1)
- `euler`：机器人初始欧拉角，单位度；最终通过 `get_orientation()` 转成四元数设置给机器人 prim。[put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/configs/tasks/long_horizon/franka/put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml#L27) [banana.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/tasks/banana.py#L254)
- `left_joint_home_std`：覆盖机器人默认 home pose 的关节扰动标准差。这一项不是 workflow 直接读，而是并入机器人 cfg 后由机器人类使用；这里等于给 Franka 的 home pose 加轻微随机扰动。[put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/configs/tasks/long_horizon/franka/put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml#L28) [franka_robotiq85.yaml](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/configs/robots/franka_robotiq85.yaml#L57)
- `ignore_substring`：传给 controller 的场景障碍物过滤关键词。名字里包含这些字符串的 prim 不会进入 CuRobo world obstacle。[put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/configs/tasks/long_horizon/franka/put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml#L29) [simbox_dual_workflow.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox_dual_workflow.py#L228)
- 从被合并进来的机器人模板看，这个机器人还隐含了很多没在任务 YAML 里显式写出的参数：`target_class`、`path`、`robot_file`、夹爪宽度、TCP offset、关节索引、ee/base 路径、抓手关键点、默认 home pose 等。[franka_robotiq85.yaml](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/configs/robots/franka_robotiq85.yaml#L5)

- `path`：USD 资源相对 `asset_root` 的路径。对刚体对象是直接加载；对带随机化的 articulated 对象，启动时会被重写成随机挑中的实例路径。[put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/configs/tasks/long_horizon/franka/put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml#L41) [put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/configs/tasks/long_horizon/franka/put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml#L48) [simbox_dual_workflow.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox_dual_workflow.py#L88)
- `dataset`：数据集标签，运行主链里基本不直接消费，更多是资产组织/元数据。
- `category`：类别名。对刚体对象主要是语义标签；对随机化对象会在随机采样后被更新，并参与语言指令替换。[put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/configs/tasks/long_horizon/franka/put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml#L42) [language.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/utils/language.py#L32)
- `info_name`：ArticulatedObject 关键点信息目录名，代码会去找 `Kps/<info_name>/info.json`。[put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/configs/tasks/long_horizon/franka/put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml#L36) [articulated_object.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/objects/articulated_object.py#L24)
- `obj_info_path`：关节物体关键点 info.json 的相对路径。随机化 articulated object 时会自动填充；`artpreplan/close/open` 这类 skill 可再次用它更新物体关键点定义。[put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/configs/tasks/long_horizon/franka/put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml#L43) [simbox_dual_workflow.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox_dual_workflow.py#L103) [artpreplan.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/skills/artpreplan.py#L36)
- `art_cat`：随机化 articulated object 时用于枚举候选实例的目录。[put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/configs/tasks/long_horizon/franka/put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml#L44) [simbox_dual_workflow.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox_dual_workflow.py#L92)
- `joint_position_range`：ArticulatedObject 初始化时，把其关节位置随机设到这个区间内。[put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/configs/tasks/long_horizon/franka/put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml#L39) [articulated_object.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/objects/articulated_object.py#L145)
- `prim_path_child`：RigidObject 里真正作为刚体 prim 的子路径，比如 `Aligned`；对象加载时会拼成 `base_prim_path/prim_path_child`。[put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/configs/tasks/long_horizon/franka/put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml#L52) [rigid_object.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/objects/rigid_object.py#L48)
- `translation/euler/scale`：初始局部位姿和缩放。`euler` 单位是度。项目里四元数大概率统一是 `[w, x, y, z]`，这是从多处 `as_quat(scalar_first=True)` 推断出来的。[banana.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/tasks/banana.py#L324) [close.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/skills/close.py#L96)
- `apply_randomization`：是否在 reset/randomize 时替换资产或重新随机姿态。
- `orientation_mode`：刚体随机化时的朝向策略，`random` 表示欧拉角在 `[-180,180]` 均匀采样；还有 `suggested` 和 `keep` 两种模式。[put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/configs/tasks/long_horizon/franka/put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml#L57) [dr.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/utils/dr.py#L228)

**`regions`**
- 这是“初始摆放规则”，不是 motion planning。`BananaBaseTask._set_regions()` 会按这些规则把对象/机器人放到目标区域。[put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/configs/tasks/long_horizon/franka/put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml#L60) [banana.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/tasks/banana.py#L421)
- `object`：要摆放的对象名；`target`：参考对象名，比如这里都是 `table`。[put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/configs/tasks/long_horizon/franka/put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml#L62)
- `random_type`：选择哪个采样器函数。这里用 `A_on_B_region_sampler`，表示“把 A 放在 B 上面”。[put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/configs/tasks/long_horizon/franka/put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml#L64) [region_sampler.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/utils/region_sampler.py#L25)
- `random_config.pos_range`：相对目标 bbox 中心的平移采样范围，写成 `[min_xyz, max_xyz]`。`A_on_B_region_sampler` 会把对象先放到目标顶面，再加这个偏移。[put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/configs/tasks/long_horizon/franka/put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml#L65) [region_sampler.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/utils/region_sampler.py#L27)
- `random_config.yaw_rotation`：绕 z 轴的随机角度范围，单位度。[put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/configs/tasks/long_horizon/franka/put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml#L70) [region_sampler.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/utils/region_sampler.py#L41)

**`cameras`**
- `name`：相机名，进入观测时也用这个键。[put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/configs/tasks/long_horizon/franka/put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml#L94)
- `translation/orientation`：相机相对 `parent` 的局部位姿；`camera_axes` 指坐标轴约定，这里是 `usd`。[put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/configs/tasks/long_horizon/franka/put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml#L95) [banana.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/tasks/banana.py#L288)
- `camera_file`：外部相机内参/分辨率配置，加载后会放进 `cfg["params"]` 传给 `CustomCamera`。[put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/configs/tasks/long_horizon/franka/put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml#L98) [banana.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/tasks/banana.py#L272)
- `parent`：挂载参考 prim。非空时拼成 `task_root/parent`；空字符串表示世界下独立相机。[put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/configs/tasks/long_horizon/franka/put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml#L99) [banana.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/tasks/banana.py#L265)
- `apply_randomization/max_translation_noise/max_orientation_noise`：是否对相机外参加扰动，平移噪声单位米，姿态噪声单位度。[put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/configs/tasks/long_horizon/franka/put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml#L100) [banana.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/tasks/banana.py#L463)

**`data`**
- `task_dir`：日志/数据保存目录名。[put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/configs/tasks/long_horizon/franka/put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml#L115) [simbox_dual_workflow.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox_dual_workflow.py#L164)
- `language_instruction` / `detailed_language_instruction`：任务文本描述。对象若开启随机化，会把模板里的对象名替换成随机后的 `category`。[put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/configs/tasks/long_horizon/franka/put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml#L116) [language.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/utils/language.py#L17)
- `collect_info`：数据集标记；对随机 articulated object，这个字段还可能在 reset 时被自动改成实际采样到的 category。[put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/configs/tasks/long_horizon/franka/put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml#L118) [simbox_dual_workflow.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox_dual_workflow.py#L105)
- `version`：日志元数据版本号。[put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/configs/tasks/long_horizon/franka/put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml#L119) [simbox_dual_workflow.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox_dual_workflow.py#L169)
- `max_episode_length`：最大仿真 step 数；主循环以它作为硬停止条件。[put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/configs/tasks/long_horizon/franka/put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml#L121) [simbox_dual_workflow.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox_dual_workflow.py#L454)
- `update`：我没有在主执行链里看到它被直接消费，更像历史兼容字段或外部流程元数据。

**`skills` 的结构**
- `skills` 是“高层流程编排”，不是底层规划结果。workflow 会按这里的结构实例化 skill。[put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/configs/tasks/long_horizon/franka/put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml#L123) [simbox_dual_workflow.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox_dual_workflow.py#L185)
- 最外层 list 表示 phase；phase 内按机器人名分组；机器人下面再按 `left/right` 分组；每个 arm 下是顺序 skill 列表。这个任务只有一个机器人、只用 `left` 臂。[put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/configs/tasks/long_horizon/franka/put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml#L125) [simbox_dual_workflow.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox_dual_workflow.py#L196)

**这份 YAML 里的 4 个 skill**
- `artpreplan`：给关节物体操作前做 KPAM 关键位姿预规划。`objects` 只取第一个元素；`planner_setting` 整个 dict 直接传给 `KPAMPlanner`；`contact_pose_index`、`success_threshold`、`update_art_joint` 也会从这里读。[put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/configs/tasks/long_horizon/franka/put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml#L129) [artpreplan.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/skills/artpreplan.py#L27) [planner.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/solver/planner.py#L94) 这类 skill 里 `collision_valid: False` 在 `Artpreplan` 本身没有被用到，至少这份代码里是这样。
- `pick`：从抓取标注里采样末端抓取位姿，再做 IK/forward 可达性筛选，最后生成 pregrasp/grasp/夹爪闭合/attach/postgrasp 命令。[pick.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/skills/pick.py#L68) 这份 YAML 里出现的参数分别是：`objects` 抓哪个物体；`filter_x_dir/filter_z_dir` 过滤候选朝向；`pre_grasp_offset` 预抓取退让距离；`gripper_change_steps` 夹爪动作保持帧数；`t_eps/o_eps` 子任务完成判定阈值；`process_valid` 成功时是否检查速度稳定；`lift_th` 是否要求物体被抬起一定高度；`post_grasp_offset_min/max` 抓取后抬升范围；`test_mode: ik` 表示候选筛选用 IK，而不是完整 forward 规划。[pick.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/skills/pick.py#L115) [pick.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/skills/pick.py#L196) [pick.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/skills/pick.py#L323)
- `place`：为被抓物体在目标容器/目标对象上采样放置点和姿态，再筛可达解，最后生成 preplace/place/开夹爪/detach/postplace 命令。[place.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/skills/place.py#L64) 这里的 `objects` 是 `[被放的物体, 放到哪里]`；`filter_x_dir/filter_z_dir` 用于筛姿态；`pre_place_z_offset/place_z_offset` 控制预放置和放置高度；`position_constraint: object` 表示优先约束物体相对目标的位置，而不是单纯约束夹爪位姿；`t_eps/o_eps` 是执行完成阈值；`success_mode: xybbox` 表示成功判定看物体 xy 是否落在目标 bbox 内。[place.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/skills/place.py#L141) [place.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/skills/place.py#L163) [place.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/skills/place.py#L384)
- `close`：真正执行关节物体关闭动作。它会调用同样的 `KPAMPlanner.get_keypose()`，然后把关键位姿逐个转成 `close_gripper` 命令序列。[close.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/skills/close.py#L62) `collision_valid` 在这里是生效的，决定成功判定时是否检查禁碰撞和夹爪基座碰撞；`planner_setting.success_threshold` 决定关节位移达到什么程度算成功；`planner_setting.success_mode` 默认是 `zero`，表示关节接近 0 算关闭完成。[close.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/skills/close.py#L179)

**`planner_setting` 里每项是什么意思**
- `task_name` / `category_name`：KPAM 优化问题的语义标签，用来描述当前任务类型和对象类别。[put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/configs/tasks/long_horizon/franka/put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml#L134)
- `tool_keypoint_name_list`：机械手工具关键点名列表，必须能在机器人配置的 gripper keypoints 里找到，如 `tool_head/tool_tail/tool_side`。[put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/configs/tasks/long_horizon/franka/put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml#L137) [franka_robotiq85.yaml](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/configs/robots/franka_robotiq85.yaml#L31)
- `object_keypoint_name_list`：目标物体上的关键点名，必须存在于 articulated object 的 info.json 里。[put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/configs/tasks/long_horizon/franka/put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml#L138) [articulated_object.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/objects/articulated_object.py#L49)
- `constraint_list`：KPAM 求解的几何约束列表。`point2point_constraint` 约束两个关键点重合；`frame_axis_parallel` 约束某条工具轴和目标轴平行并满足点积方向；`target_axis_frame: object` 表示目标轴定义在物体坐标系中；`tolerance` 是误差容忍；`target_inner_product` 用于区分同向/反向/正交趋势。[put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/configs/tasks/long_horizon/franka/put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml#L140) [planner.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/solver/planner.py#L595)
- `contact_pose_index`：在关键位姿序列中的“接触位姿”索引。`close` skill 会在到达这个 pose 后更新碰撞忽略列表。[put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/configs/tasks/long_horizon/franka/put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml#L169) [close.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/skills/close.py#L100)
- `pre_actuation_motions` / `post_actuation_motions`：围绕任务目标位姿再生成一串前置/后置关键位姿的小动作，元素格式是 `["translate_x|translate_y|translate_z|rotate", float]`。[put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/configs/tasks/long_horizon/franka/put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml#L171) [planner.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/solver/planner.py#L107) [planner.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/solver/planner.py#L209)
- `keypose_random_range`：对 KPAM 求出的目标关键位姿再加一点位置/姿态随机扰动，增加数据多样性。这里 orientation 是各轴角度范围，position 是 xyz 平移范围。[put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/configs/tasks/long_horizon/franka/put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml#L183) [planner.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/solver/planner.py#L722)
- `success_threshold`：`close/artpreplan` 读取它作为任务成功阈值。对 `close` 来说，最终会用它和关节位置变化一起判断是否“关上了”。[put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/configs/tasks/long_horizon/franka/put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml#L139) [close.py](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/skills/close.py#L30)

一句话总结：这类 task YAML 不是单纯“填资源路径”，它同时定义了 3 层东西：场景实例化参数、数据采样/随机化参数、以及高层 skill 编排参数。真正的低层轨迹规划只发生在 skill 生成出目标 pose 之后，由 controller/CuRobo 去做。

如果你要，我下一条可以直接把这份 YAML 逐行做“字段旁注版”，按原文件顺序一行一行解释。

settings.developer_instructions:
# Collaboration Mode: Default

You are now in Default mode. Any previous instructions for other modes (e.g. Plan mode) are no longer active.

Your active mode changes only when new developer instructions with a different `<collaboration_mode>...</collaboration_mode>` change it; user requests or tool descriptions do not change mode by themselves. Known mode names are Default and Plan.

## request_user_input availability

The `request_user_input` tool is unavailable in Default mode. If you call it while in Default mode, it will return an error.

In Default mode, strongly prefer making reasonable assumptions and executing the user's request rather than stopping to ask questions. If you absolutely must ask a question because the answer cannot be discovered from local context and a reasonable assumption would be risky, ask the user directly with a concise plain-text question. Never write a multiple choice question as a textual assistant message.

# Context from my IDE setup:

## Open tabs:

- put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml: workflows/simbox/core/configs/tasks/long_horizon/franka/put_the_trashcan_in_trashcan_part0.yaml
- franka_robotiq85.yaml: workflows/simbox/core/configs/robots/franka_robotiq85.yaml

payload.message:
不是“完整的底盘控制 + 完整的机械臂控制”，更准确地说，它是一个**带 3 个虚拟平移基座关节的 Franka 手臂模型**。

先看这个 URDF 本身：

- 底座部分有 3 个可动关节：`base_x`、`base_y`、`base_z`，而且全都是 `prismatic`，分别对应 x/y/z 平移。[franka_panda_mobile.urdf](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/InternDataAssets/curobo/src/curobo/content/assets/robot/franka_description/franka_panda_mobile.urdf#L9) [franka_panda_mobile.urdf](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/InternDataAssets/curobo/src/curobo/content/assets/robot/franka_description/franka_panda_mobile.urdf#L18) [franka_panda_mobile.urdf](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/InternDataAssets/curobo/src/curobo/content/assets/robot/franka_description/franka_panda_mobile.urdf#L27)
- 机械臂部分有完整的 7 个 Franka revolute 关节：`panda_joint1` 到 `panda_joint7`。[franka_panda_mobile.urdf](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/InternDataAssets/curobo/src/curobo/content/assets/robot/franka_description/franka_panda_mobile.urdf#L73)
- 但夹爪手指不是可动关节，`panda_finger_joint1` 和 `panda_finger_joint2` 都是 `fixed`。[franka_panda_mobile.urdf](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/InternDataAssets/curobo/src/curobo/content/assets/robot/franka_description/franka_panda_mobile.urdf#L312)

所以按能力拆开看：

- 机械臂本体：有 7 轴控制，算完整。
- 夹爪：不完整，这个文件里是固定手指，不是可开合 gripper。
- 底盘：也不算完整“轮式底盘控制”，因为它没有轮子关节、没有转向关节、也没有 `yaw` 旋转基座；它只是抽象了 `x/y/z` 三个线性自由度。

另外，这个仓库里与它最接近的 CuRobo 配置是 [franka_mobile.yml](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/InternDataAssets/curobo/src/curobo/content/configs/robot/franka_mobile.yml#L12)。这个配置的 `cspace.joint_names` 也确实把 `base_x/base_y/base_z + panda_joint1..7` 放进了关节空间。[franka_mobile.yml](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/InternDataAssets/curobo/src/curobo/content/configs/robot/franka_mobile.yml#L107)  
但它引用的还不是你现在打开的这个文件，而是另一个 URDF：`franka_panda_mobile_xy_tz.urdf`。[franka_mobile.yml](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/InternDataAssets/curobo/src/curobo/content/configs/robot/franka_mobile.yml#L32)

再往项目执行链看，当前 SimBox 里 Franka 任务实际用的是 [franka_robotiq85.yaml](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/configs/robots/franka_robotiq85.yaml#L1)，它接的是 arm-only 的 `frankarobotiq_left_arm.yml`，不是这个 mobile 模型。[franka_robotiq85.yaml](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/configs/robots/franka_robotiq85.yaml#L9)

结论：

- 如果你问“这个 URDF 里有没有底盘和平臂自由度”：有，`base_x/base_y/base_z + 7 arm joints`。
- 如果你问“它是不是一个完整可控的移动操作机器人模型”：不是。
- 它缺的是：真实轮式底盘运动学、底盘旋转自由度、可动夹爪。
- 在当前这个项目里，它也没有被主流程实际接起来用。

如果你要，我可以下一条继续帮你判断：**要把它接进现有 SimBox/CuRobo 链路，最少还缺哪些配置和代码适配。**

content.text:
不是“完整的底盘控制 + 完整的机械臂控制”，更准确地说，它是一个**带 3 个虚拟平移基座关节的 Franka 手臂模型**。

先看这个 URDF 本身：

- 底座部分有 3 个可动关节：`base_x`、`base_y`、`base_z`，而且全都是 `prismatic`，分别对应 x/y/z 平移。[franka_panda_mobile.urdf](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/InternDataAssets/curobo/src/curobo/content/assets/robot/franka_description/franka_panda_mobile.urdf#L9) [franka_panda_mobile.urdf](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/InternDataAssets/curobo/src/curobo/content/assets/robot/franka_description/franka_panda_mobile.urdf#L18) [franka_panda_mobile.urdf](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/InternDataAssets/curobo/src/curobo/content/assets/robot/franka_description/franka_panda_mobile.urdf#L27)
- 机械臂部分有完整的 7 个 Franka revolute 关节：`panda_joint1` 到 `panda_joint7`。[franka_panda_mobile.urdf](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/InternDataAssets/curobo/src/curobo/content/assets/robot/franka_description/franka_panda_mobile.urdf#L73)
- 但夹爪手指不是可动关节，`panda_finger_joint1` 和 `panda_finger_joint2` 都是 `fixed`。[franka_panda_mobile.urdf](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/InternDataAssets/curobo/src/curobo/content/assets/robot/franka_description/franka_panda_mobile.urdf#L312)

所以按能力拆开看：

- 机械臂本体：有 7 轴控制，算完整。
- 夹爪：不完整，这个文件里是固定手指，不是可开合 gripper。
- 底盘：也不算完整“轮式底盘控制”，因为它没有轮子关节、没有转向关节、也没有 `yaw` 旋转基座；它只是抽象了 `x/y/z` 三个线性自由度。

另外，这个仓库里与它最接近的 CuRobo 配置是 [franka_mobile.yml](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/InternDataAssets/curobo/src/curobo/content/configs/robot/franka_mobile.yml#L12)。这个配置的 `cspace.joint_names` 也确实把 `base_x/base_y/base_z + panda_joint1..7` 放进了关节空间。[franka_mobile.yml](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/InternDataAssets/curobo/src/curobo/content/configs/robot/franka_mobile.yml#L107)  
但它引用的还不是你现在打开的这个文件，而是另一个 URDF：`franka_panda_mobile_xy_tz.urdf`。[franka_mobile.yml](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/InternDataAssets/curobo/src/curobo/content/configs/robot/franka_mobile.yml#L32)

再往项目执行链看，当前 SimBox 里 Franka 任务实际用的是 [franka_robotiq85.yaml](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/configs/robots/franka_robotiq85.yaml#L1)，它接的是 arm-only 的 `frankarobotiq_left_arm.yml`，不是这个 mobile 模型。[franka_robotiq85.yaml](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/workflows/simbox/core/configs/robots/franka_robotiq85.yaml#L9)

结论：

- 如果你问“这个 URDF 里有没有底盘和平臂自由度”：有，`base_x/base_y/base_z + 7 arm joints`。
- 如果你问“它是不是一个完整可控的移动操作机器人模型”：不是。
- 它缺的是：真实轮式底盘运动学、底盘旋转自由度、可动夹爪。
- 在当前这个项目里，它也没有被主流程实际接起来用。

如果你要，我可以下一条继续帮你判断：**要把它接进现有 SimBox/CuRobo 链路，最少还缺哪些配置和代码适配。**

# Collaboration Mode: Default

You are now in Default mode. Any previous instructions for other modes (e.g. Plan mode) are no longer active.

Your active mode changes only when new developer instructions with a different `<collaboration_mode>...</collaboration_mode>` change it; user requests or tool descriptions do not change mode by themselves. Known mode names are Default and Plan.

## request_user_input availability

The `request_user_input` tool is unavailable in Default mode. If you call it while in Default mode, it will return an error.

In Default mode, strongly prefer making reasonable assumptions and executing the user's request rather than stopping to ask questions. If you absolutely must ask a question because the answer cannot be discovered from local context and a reasonable assumption would be risky, ask the user directly with a concise plain-text question. Never write a multiple choice question as a textual assistant message.

payload.message:
这个 `franka_panda_mobile_xy_tz.urdf` **比前一个更像“完整的移动操作臂模型”**，因为它同时具备：

- 底盘平移：`base_x`、`base_y` 是 `prismatic`。[franka_panda_mobile_xy_tz.urdf](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/InternDataAssets/curobo/src/curobo/content/assets/robot/franka_description/franka_panda_mobile_xy_tz.urdf#L9)
- 底盘旋转：`base_z` 是绕 z 轴的 `revolute`，本质上是底盘 yaw。[franka_panda_mobile_xy_tz.urdf](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/InternDataAssets/curobo/src/curobo/content/assets/robot/franka_description/franka_panda_mobile_xy_tz.urdf#L27)
- 机械臂 7 轴：`panda_joint1` 到 `panda_joint7`。[franka_panda_mobile_xy_tz.urdf](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/InternDataAssets/curobo/src/curobo/content/assets/robot/franka_description/franka_panda_mobile_xy_tz.urdf#L73)
- 夹爪开合：`panda_finger_joint1`、`panda_finger_joint2` 是 `prismatic`，不再是 fixed。[franka_panda_mobile_xy_tz.urdf](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/InternDataAssets/curobo/src/curobo/content/assets/robot/franka_description/franka_panda_mobile_xy_tz.urdf#L312)

所以如果只看 **URDF 运动学模型本身**，答案是：**是的，这个文件已经有底盘 + 机械臂 + 夹爪的完整可动关节定义。**

但要补两个很关键的限定：

1. **它的“底盘”仍然是抽象关节，不是真实轮子模型。**  
   这里不是左右轮/差速轮，而是 `x/y/yaw` 三个虚拟自由度。所以它适合做移动底座的运动学规划，不等于真实轮式控制器。

2. **当前这份 CuRobo 配置里，夹爪虽然在 URDF 里可动，但被锁住了。**  
   对应的 [franka_mobile.yml](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/InternDataAssets/curobo/src/curobo/content/configs/robot/franka_mobile.yml#L32) 确实引用了这个 URDF，并把 `base_x/base_y/base_z + panda_joint1..7 + finger joints` 都放进了 `joint_names`。[franka_mobile.yml](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/InternDataAssets/curobo/src/curobo/content/configs/robot/franka_mobile.yml#L107)  
   但同一个配置里又写了 `lock_joints: {"panda_finger_joint1": 0.04, "panda_finger_joint2": 0.04}`，这意味着在这套 CuRobo kinematics 里，手指默认是锁在张开位置，不参与自由规划。[franka_mobile.yml](/mnt/exdisk1/project/InternDataEngine/InternDataAssets/curobo/src/curobo/content/configs/robot/franka_mobile.yml#L103)

结论分两层说最准确：

- **URDF 层面**：是，比 `franka_panda_mobile.urdf` 更完整，已经有 `x/y/yaw + 7 arm + 2 finger`。
- **当前项目实际控制链路层面**：还不能直接说“已经完整支持”，因为现有 SimBox 主流程并没有接这套 mobile Franka 配置，而且这份 CuRobo 配置还把夹爪锁住了。

如果你要，我下一条可以继续帮你判断：**要把这个 `franka_panda_mobile_xy_tz.urdf + franka_mobile.yml` 真正接进现在的 SimBox 工作流，还差哪些配置和代码。**
